headline: Deutsche Bank Highlights Positive Momentum in ON Semiconductor Corporation (ON) Q4 Performance
summary: ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:ON) is among the 12 Most Promising EV Battery Stocks to Buy Now. ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:ON) is one of the most promising stocks.
